summary: Chart interaction and packaging fixes with cleaner release publish logs.
release_notes: Fixed chart auto-follow so candle tracking pauses only during actual drag/crosshair movement and resumes normally after interaction.
Unified live price display across chart windows for the same symbol so stale candles no longer show different prices per timeframe.
Added release-notes.html to the bundled app data so the Release Notes page no longer returns 404 in packaged builds.
Fixed publish log commit range and truncation handling for more reliable release output.
